name: Reelo
tagline: Turn any idea into scroll-stopping short videos.
product: AI short-video studio — create + schedule short-form video everywhere
mascot: Reelo bot — a glossy soft-3D play-button creature, violet-to-cyan
styleSignature: vibrant modern SaaS 3D illustration, glossy soft-3D shapes, electric violet-to-cyan gradients, glassmorphism, clean studio lighting, playful energetic premium tech aesthetic, crisp and polished. No text, no words, no letters.

engines.buttons: fal:fal-ai/ideogram/v3 (modern SaaS style A: sleek glassy violet-to-cyan gradient, tasteful, not candy-gloss)
engines.video: fal:fal-ai/kling-video/v2.5-turbo/pro/image-to-video (vertical 9:16 feature loops + accent areas, NOT full-bleed bg everywhere)
engines.mascot: fal:flux-pro/v1.1-ultra -> imgkit keyout (corner colour + tuned fuzz)

layoutNotes: ORIGINAL layout (not the cinematic-photo skeleton): bento hero with mascot + floating UI chips + gradient orbs; logo marquee; bento feature grid; vertical-video card row (phone-framed 9:16 loops); mascot value section; 3 pricing tiers; testimonials; final CTA band with mascot. Large accent graphics. No emojis, no invented SVGs (generate play/check/arrow/star icons). Mascot modal embeds a YouTube placeholder.
